recommendations.title: Relax investor accumulate score floor 65 → 60
recommendations.rationale: 543 missed moves were on tickers already in our universe — we watched them but didn't enter. 491 were ≥8% moves. last changed 15.1d ago · floor 55 · default 70.

recommendations.title: Widen trailing stop to reduce 11 churn events
recommendations.rationale: 11 moves were entered AND exited prematurely — leaving ~182.69% combined upside on the table. The trailing-stop multiplier may be too tight for the current regime.

recommendations.title: Run calibration analysis — capture rate 4.8% is below floor
recommendations.rationale: Only 32 of 662 moves were captured. Calibration will analyze recent trade autopsies and propose parameter nudges. Auto-applicable (tier 1).
recommendations.expected_impact: tier-1 deltas applied automatically; tier-2 surfaced for review

recommendations.title: Window summary: 619 missed · 32 captured · 11 churned
recommendations.rationale: 543 of the misses were in-universe (engine gap); 76 were out-of-universe (screener gap). Top 3 missed: KLAC -88.37%, DELL 123%, ARM 95.41%.

tactical_cross.tactical_title: 2-year yields spike amid hawkish FOMC signals; equities show muted response.

actions.title: Widen trailing stop to reduce 11 churn events
Live CRO tactical overlay favors specific themes while multiple TT-core plays sat idle — align trigger coverage with the tactical rotation.

gameplan.narrative: Capture 4.8% of 662 ATR-qualified moves over 60d (543 in-universe misses, 76 out-of-universe). Binding constraint: conviction thresholds (rank/HTF) sat below the bar (58.1% of 229 classified misses). 10 plays ran (67 trades); idle plays: tt_gap_reversal_short, tt_n_test_resistance, tt_range_reversal_short, tt_reclaim, tt_mean_revert. Top repeated miss archetype: Missed mega(≥15%) LONG moves (×21). CRO tactical overlay live (2-year yields spike amid hawkish FOMC signals; equities show) while 5 playbook plays sat idle — review whether gates or triggers are deferring valid setups in hot themes. Promotion pipeline: 5 screener candidate(s) need review (top: CIFR, AMAT).
